name: Collective Mining Ltd.
description: Collective Mining Ltd. is a gold-silver-copper-tungsten explorer focused on the district-scale Guayabales Project in Caldas, Colombia, anchored by the large-scale Apollo system. Led by the former Continental Gold management team that sold that company for C$2.0 billion, Collective has completed over 143,500 metres of drilling and has US$145 million in cash for its 2026 exploration program.
